since_last: 79% of 84 AI names green; AI Chips & Compute leads +3.72%; AI bubble risk 57 Heating Up.

cards.headline: The tape: a broad bid, 79% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX +0.72% · BTC +0.94% · Gold +1.81% · Nasdaq100 +1.26%. 79% of 84 AI names are green — a broad bid. AI Chips & Compute is doing the heavy lifting at +3.72%.

cards.headline: AI Chips & Compute leads, AI Applications & Data Software lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is AI Chips & Compute at +3.72%; weakest is AI Applications & Data Software at +0.47%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: CEVA is the standout at +11.48%
cards.body: Leaders: CEVA +11.48%, ANET +8.18%, INOD +7.65%, AMD +7.10%, SOUN +6.87%. Laggards: AVAV -7.28%, PUBM -2.14%, SPCX -1.89%, DDOG -1.87%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) -1.89% at $158.94
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is -1.89% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 57 — Heating Up
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 57/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
